titleStmt.title: SII 5.1403: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 1403. (A.R. No. 40 of 1897). ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE RAJAGOPALA-PERUMAL TEMPLE AT TANJORE. Of this inscription, lines 1 to 4 and 9 to 13 are on the west wall while lines 5 to 8, which are mutilated at the ends, are on the south wall.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Ariharāyavibhā ṭan bhāṣai kku ttappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyara kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu ruṭātān pūrvadakṣiṇapaścimo ttara ca tussamudrādhipati Īḻamum kampaḷamum koṇṭuaruḷiya rājādhirājan rāja
parameścaran coḷamaṇḍalapratiṣṭhācāryan toṇḍamaṇḍalastāpānācāryan gaja- veṭṭaiyum nāḷveṭṭaiyum kaṇṭaruḷiya śrīvirapradāpa Accudadevamahārā- yar pradhuvirājyam pa ṇṇāniṉṟa śakāpdam 1000 4 100 6 10 1 I taṉmel cellāniṉṟa viḷampisamvatsarattu siṁ hanāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu E
kādaśiyum bṛhaspativāramum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti ṉāḷ pāṇṭikulāciṉiyvaḷanāṭṭut tañcāūrkūṟṟattu tañcāpuri tirumalaiyammaṉpeṭṭaiyil tirumalaiyammaṉ dharmmamāka perumāḷ madanagopālapperumāḷai tirupradiṣṭhai pa ṇṇukai yil perumāḷ madanagopālapperumāḷ tiruk koyiluk ku rāyar
Acyutadevamahārāyar Adiṣṭhāna māka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa tiruvi ḷam ba ṟṟinapaṭi Ākka- nūr samayadroharakaṇḍan ko ṇṭamanāyakkar pu ttran pāpayanāyakkarkku po ṟpaṇḍārakkā ṇiyāḻccikku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam śi ṟuvarampūrile śe tta [i ṟai] yili nilam veli nāḷ Oṉṉukku mānnyapra
sādam ku ṟuṇi muppatuvaṭṭamum nāḷ Oṉṟukku Ammutu śeta Adirasam Irupatu suki yaṉ Irupatu pāyasam Irunāḻiyālk ku ḻampu Irunāḻi Aṭ Aikkāyammutu mu ppatu Ilaiammutu A ṟupatu cāttuppaṭi śan=ta nam palam Oṉṟukku Āka I vakai paṇṇyāra cuvantram māsam Oṉṟukku nāḷ Iraṇḍu niṟvāka Ilakkai māsam Oṉṟukku paṇam A ñcu
tampalavakkum tirukkaivaḻakkam parumatāṉa kopālaṉkā(l)lāl nellu 5- ḷa tiṅkaḷ tivacam Atiyakaṭṭaḷai ṉaivettiyattil varum viḻukkāṭum paṭṭayam taravukku Eḻuttum liṅkappaṉāyakkaṟkku meykāvalkkāṇi Āḻccikku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam ciṟuvarampūrile cetta I ṟaiyili nilam veli ṉāḷ O
ṉāḷukku parivaṭṭam muḻam 10 2 kaliyāṇamukuttam palavukkum dha5i5- ḷa taravukku Eḻuttum kaṇappaṉāyakkaṟkku Aṟaikāval kāṇi Āṭcikku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam ciṟuvarampūril cetta Iṟaiyili ṉilam veli ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku māniyapicātam 3 . niṟuvāka Ilakkai mātam Oṉṟukku ṭṭa 5 Ūḻiyam Āḷ Ira
pāppayaṉāyakkar puttiraṉ veṅkaṭāttiriṉāyakkaṟku koyilkeḻvi ṉāyakattukku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭam ciṟuvarampūril cetta Iṟaiyili ṉilam veli picātam 3 . niṟuvāka Ilakkai ṭṭa 5 paṇiyāram muṟai Iraṇṭu periya tirunāḷ parivaṭṭam ṭṭa 5 mukuttam palavukkum ṭṭa 5 taravukku Eḻuttu muṭippukku muttiraicā
tañcaimāmaṇi gau tamagotra ttu vai kānasasūtra ttu purāṇabhaṭṭa r putran Ulakuyyaniṉṟaperumāḷ keka Iramacantarā ṉa matanakopāla nampikkum kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭatāna Iniṟuvākam mātam Oṉṟukku 2 10 meṟpaṭiūr kāśyapagotra ttu vaikhānasasūtra ttu go vintapaṭṭar nilamekar puttiraṉ
pāvikka Oṇṇāta perumāḷukku tāna niṟuvāka nāḷ 10 Āka nāḷ 3 10 vaṭṭattukkum kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku mānnyaprasādam �4 10 6 tiruviḷaiyāṭṭañ ciṟuvarampūril cetta Iṟaiyili nilam 1- liyum mataṉakopāla nampiyāṟku kuṭai Āḷ Iṟaiyili nilam va� Āka
nilamkavapa niṟuvākailakkai ṭṭa 1- kku puru-yāl paṇṇiyāram muṉṟuum tiruvārādha nattukku viḷakku pattukkum 3- nāḷukku piṟacātam 5 ḷa tirukkaivaḻakkam naṉmai tiṉmaikku ṭṭa 5 ḷa 5- ḷa periya tirunāḷ parivaṭṭattu(tu)kku 5 caṅakiṟamattirunāḷukku
parivaṭṭama muḻam 10 2 kaṟpakavalliyār teṟkuvitiyil viṭṭa maṉai 3 Ituvum paṭṭayam tarapukka Eḻuttum putra pautra paramparaiyāka kāṇiāṭciyāka Ā ṇṭum A nupavittukkoṇṭum tiruvācalil muṉṉukku patiyiṟ cutantra mum paṟṟikkoṇṭu candrātitya
varaiyum sukha ttile Irukkavum pūrayato budhavā ñchām vāra yato vairibhūpacittamidam Accuta vihita vibhū teraccutarāyasya śāsanam tadidam śubhamastu .The following two lines, which must belong to another inscription of Achyuta, are engraved on the tiers of the south wall:— 1 ppiṟasādam 3 | niṟuvāka ilakkai mātam 1- kku ṭṭa 5 ūḻiyam āḷ 2- kku māsam oṉṟukku ṭṭa 7 ṉāḷ oṉṟukku pa•• prasādam [iru]ṉāḻi māsam oṉṟukku paṇiyāramuṟai | 2 | periyatirunāḷ parivaṭṭattukku ṭṭa 5 | sa[m*]krama tirunāḷuk[ku]• rivaṭṭamuḻam | 10 2 | mukuṟttam palavukkum tirukkaivaḻakkam | ṭṭa 5 i 5 ḷa |-taravukku eḻuttum intakkāṇiyāṭcipperkaḷukku vaṭakku•• •••• 2 ttile tirukkovil ūḻiyam paṇṇikkoṇṭu su kattile irukkavum | etat surāsu[ro]ttuṅga maulimāl[opa]lālitam . śrīmat gopāladeva[sya*] tañcaināthasya śāsanam . pūrayato budhavā[ṁ*]chā[m vā]raya to vairibhūpacittamidam . acyutavi hitavibhūteracyutarājasya śāsa[ nam jayati ||*]
Digital edition of SII 5.1403 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
